/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/html_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/style_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/paint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/xcm_rgba_raster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/xcm_input_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/xcm_gpu_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_glfw_preview.dir/src/xcm_glfw_preview.cpp.o -o xcm_glfw_preview  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
